name: ackvyn-crm-worker
description: Ackvyn CRM API Worker — Durable Objects, WebSockets, email, git sync. Deploy from https://github.com/Ackvyn/crm/tree/main/worker

CRM.description: SQLite Durable Object for live chat, presence, and per-site CRM state (provisioned automatically).

ASSETS.description: Optional static embeds on the Worker hostname (`embed.js`). Console/GUI still load from the CDN.

GITHUB_TOKEN.description: Leave blank until you paste **your own** GitHub PAT (Contents access to `CRM_GIT_REPO`). Never reuse a sample token — create one under GitHub → Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens.

CRM_DATA_PASSPHRASE.description: Leave blank and paste a **unique long random string** (not a short login password). Same value on this Worker secret and in the CRM console. Generate one at [crm.ackvyn.org/worker.html#passphrase](https://crm.ackvyn.org/worker.html#passphrase) or `openssl rand -base64 32`.

AUTH_WORKER_URL.description: Base URL of **your** auth Worker (GitHub OAuth), e.g. `https://your-auth.workers.dev`. Required for console admin APIs.

ALLOWED_SITE_ORIGINS.description: Comma-separated HTTPS origins allowed for CORS (your operator site + client sites).

CRM_GIT_REPO.description: `owner/repo` where encrypted CRM files are stored (same repo your Pages/site uses is fine).

CRM_INBOUND_EMAIL_SITE.description: Default site key when inbound Email Routing has no alias map match.
